rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"When task.md specifies exact verbatim text to insert, the plan must use that exact string — paraphrasing or rephrasing is a spec violation, even if the meaning is similar.","scope":"plan / task specification"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The plan text should be a direct copy-paste of the task specification text, not a reformulation with the same meaning.","scope":"plan authoring"}]}
